summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of two new sections: AI as a Service section and Phishing Detection Game. Both features are fully functional with all required components working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Minor timing issue when transitioning to results screen after 5th email
minor_issues.impact: Game still completes successfully, just requires slightly longer wait time

passed_tests: AI Service section renders with correct heading about AI transforming industries

All 6 AI service cards display with correct titles: AI Strategy & Integration, AI Security & Governance, AI-Powered Threat Detection, Shadow AI Monitoring, Data Loss Prevention for AI, AI Readiness Assessments
78% stat card displays correctly in AI section
Navigation 'AI' link successfully scrolls to AI service section
Cyber Game section renders with 'Can you spot the phish?' heading
Start Challenge button initiates game and shows first email
Game displays email from, subject, and preview text correctly
Legitimate and Phishing answer buttons are clickable and functional
Feedback system shows correct/incorrect responses with detailed explanations
Game successfully progresses through all 5 emails
Play Again button restarts the game to intro state
Game randomly selects 5 emails from pool of 8 as designed
